The detector belongs to a group of very high quality so-called. optical detectors, which, unlike ionisation detectors, do not contain radioactive material. It reacts to the visible fumes (smoke) produced by combustion. The device is not connected to the mains, but uses its own power supply, namely an ordinary 9V battery. Don't worry, before it runs out, the beeper starts beeping at regular intervals. For even greater assurance, the device uses a so-called tester, a button that, when pressed, tests the functionality of the device, similar to the way it is used for example in bathroom circuit breakers.
